BCB_5AGen1_v6.5

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 792
Recv ID: 793
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 67
Func Name: BCB

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "JF2",
    "soft": "D200",
    "version": "3050"
  }
]

      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "DTCStatus.warningIndicatorRequested": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCFailureType.Category": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCFailureType": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCDeviceIdentifier": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCDeviceAndFailureTypeOBD": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCFailureType.ManufacturerOrSupplier": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatusAvailabilityMask": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
